report.summary: Fixed OptionsPnLCalculator chart fill rendering bug and mobile input UX, added calculator to DeFi Options ToC, and added keyboard focus-visible styles to both new learn pages.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: OptionsPnLCalculator: Fixed SVG profit/loss fill path rendering — previous .filter() approach created broken non-contiguous paths when P&L crossed zero; replaced with proper clamp-to-zero fill tracing that correctly renders contiguous green (profit) and red (loss) regions
OptionsPnLCalculator: Added inputMode='decimal' to all numeric inputs — triggers numeric keyboard on mobile/touch devices instead of full alpha keyboard
DeFi Options Trading Guide: Added 'Interactive P&L Calculator' to Table of Contents with anchor id='pnl-calculator' — calculator was previously invisible in page navigation
DeFi Options Trading Guide: Added focus-visible outline styles (2px solid #6366f1) to all links and buttons for WCAG keyboard navigation compliance
Ethereum 2026 Upgrade Roadmap: Added focus-visible outline styles (2px solid #6366f1) to all links for WCAG keyboard navigation compliance

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: No new OG images needed — both ethereum-2026-upgrade-roadmap and defi-options-trading-guide already have SVG + PNG OG images from previous build cycle

sections.title: UX Audit Findings (No Action Needed)
items: Ethereum Upgrade Roadmap: Timeline table has proper overflow-x-auto with touch scrolling, role='region', and aria-label — mobile handling is solid
Ethereum Upgrade Roadmap: Holder/Staker/L2 card grid uses auto-fit minmax(240px, 1fr) — degrades cleanly to single column on mobile
Ethereum Upgrade Roadmap: Breadcrumb, ToC, header badges, FAQ, and related articles follow established degen0x article layout pattern — no changes needed
DeFi Options Guide: Protocol comparison cards and table both have proper responsive handling and overflow scrolling
DeFi Options Guide: Risk section cards use consistent warning styling with red borders — clear visual hierarchy
OptionsPnLCalculator: Already has aria-live='polite' on results, aria-pressed on toggle buttons, fieldsets with legends, and 44px min-height touch targets — strong accessibility baseline
